title: Positional awareness — location, heading, movement always known
motto: Place and bearing are never optional — movement and its mode are receipt. Every object and positional is priority 1 until familiarized.

always_known.location: Operator GPS or sealed address — lat/lon + label
always_known.heading: bearing_deg from field lattice, threat geometry, or sense wire
always_known.movement: approach · recede · stable from 4D delta_t and temporal slope
always_known.movement_mode: geometry class — stable, approaching, receding, trespass, humanoid policy

unfamiliar_priority.rule: All objects and positionals are IDENTIFY priority 1 until marked familiar or auto-familiarized
